sourcesContent:
export const DATA = {
  name: "Kottamasu Harshith",
  short: "Harshith",
  location: "Hyderabad, India",
  phone: "+91 96662 64643",
  personalEmail: "harshithkottamasu@gmail.com",
  collegeEmail: "se23umcs029@mahindrauniversity.edu.in",
  college: "Mahindra University",
  degree: "Integrated Computer Science",
  years: "2023 – 2028",
  github: "HarshithKottamasu",
  linkedin: "https://www.linkedin.com/in/harshith-kottamasu-352037309/",
  skills: ["React", "JavaScript", "Python", "HTML", "CSS", "Git"],
  about: [
    "Hi, I'm Harshith. I'm a 3rd-year Integrated Computer Science student based in Hyderabad, India. I'm passionate about Web Development and Data Science — I love building clean, responsive websites and working with data to find meaningful insights.",
    "I'm always exploring new technologies and working on projects that challenge me to grow as a developer."
  ],
  interests: [
    { title: "Web Development", desc: "Building clean, responsive and performant web experiences using modern frameworks and best practices." },
    { title: "Data Science", desc: "Extracting meaningful insights from data through analysis, visualization, and machine learning techniques." },
    { title: "Deep Learning", desc: "Designing and training neural network architectures for image classification and generative modelling." },
    { title: "Open Source", desc: "Contributing to and learning from the open-source community, sharing knowledge and code freely." },
  ],
  projects: [
    {
      name: "Deep Learning Image Classification",
      desc: "Built and trained CNN models (LeNet, VGG, ResNet) for image classification tasks; improved accuracy through hyperparameter tuning and data preprocessing. Benchmarked multiple architectures and visualized feature maps to understand model behaviour.",
      tech: ["Python", "PyTorch", "CNN", "ResNet", "VGG"],
      repo: "https://github.com/HarshithKottamasu/deep-learning-image-classification",
      year: "2024",
    },
    {
      name: "GAN Implementation",
      desc: "Developed a GAN model to generate synthetic images; worked on training stability and loss optimization for better output quality. Experimented with DCGAN architecture and progressive training strategies.",
      tech: ["Python", "PyTorch", "GAN", "DCGAN", "Deep Learning"],
      repo: "https://github.com/HarshithKottamasu/gan-implementation",
      year: "2025",
    },
  ],
};
